accurate.why: Correctly describes CRA disapproval of FHWA Buy America EV charger waiver rule.

no_hallucinations.why: CRA, Fed Reg cite, and Buy America context accurate.

states_purpose.why: States purpose: nullify the specified FHWA rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes nullification of the agency rule (no force or effect).

exceptions_conditions.why: Describes rule's carve-outs (steel/iron housing excluded, 55% phase-out) as accurate context.

effective_dates.why: Cites rule's own dates (waiver through June 30 2024, install by Oct 1 2024); accurate context.

correct_entities.why: FHWA, CRA, Federal Register citation correct.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
